The current approach in the treatment of musculoskeletal problems is to increase the strength, endurance and flexibility of your muscles. Both the evaluation of your muscular strength and your strength training will be performed with the Isomed 2000 Isokinetic Device. Your isokinetic tests will be performed twice, before you are admitted to the treatment program and after your treatment is completed.

The SYNRGY360 system breaks new ground in exercise equipment by providing multiple exercise approaches in one space, creating a fun, inviting and meaningful exercise experience for everyone. XM offers six separate workout areas, including a dedicated seven-arm bar area. This special design of the Life Fitness SYNRGY 360 is customized to best reflect your workout programs and goals and provide our athletes with the motivation they want and need.

Aerobic exercises are the most important part of an exercise program for healthy people and people with any disease. Before giving aerobic exercise in our clinic, your aerobic exercise capacity is evaluated with the COSMED QUARK CPET device and customized exercise is given to you according to your results. This device determines all your gas exchange during exercise, especially your oxygen uptake and carbon dioxide output capacity.

There are many aspects that distinguish us from other physiotherapy and rehabilitation clinics. The first of these is that academicians specialized in different fields serve in their own units. Secondly, patients who apply to our clinic are treated with a holistic approach, not only from an exercise therapy perspective.

In line with the needs of the patients, they are supported by other units of our clinic throughout their treatment without the need for any other process. In addition to the globally accepted treatment program and according to the need, oral-motor rehabilitation, spine health, hand rehabilitation, orthopedic rehabilitation, sports health, neurological rehabilitation, cardiopulmonary rehabilitation and lymph edema massage are aimed to provide support from all necessary approaches to improve recovery. By supporting our patients with technological devices (isokinetic devices, exercise equipment, etc.) in the clinical exercise unit, recovery is provided in the best, shortest and versatile way.
